title: Successors who are creditors, order of preference
doc_html:
Art. 1418.  Successors who are creditors, order of preference

Successors who are creditors of the estate are paid in the same order of preference as other creditors.

Acts 1997, No. 1421, §1, eff. July 1, 1999.
